user.reason: The learner explicitly requested examples before abstraction.

subscription.reason: The learner can follow examples but is unsure when applying the idea alone.

mentorSummary.summary: The learner is progressing but loses confidence during independent application.
followUpTopics: Check confidence after one guided and one independent exercise.

checkpointSummary.summary: The learner is progressing but still loses confidence during independent application.
changesSincePrevious: The guided example added after the previous checkpoint made the first attempt easier.
successes: Completed an independent exercise after one guided example.
challenges: Confidence still drops when no example is available.
agreedAdjustments: Keep one guided example before the first independent exercise.
validationTopics: Ask whether the learner can begin the next independent exercise with less prompting.

memory.summary: The jump from a worked example to independent application feels too large.

feedback.feedbackText: The mentor sometimes moves to the next explanation too quickly.
feedback.aiSummary: Learner wants more reflection time before topic changes.
